name: AutoMem: Automated Learning of Memory as a Cognitive Skill (arXiv 2607.01224)
content: Memory expertise is a learned skill: knowing what to encode, when to retrieve, and how to organize knowledge--a capacity known in cognitive science as metamemory. We bring this perspective to LLMs by treating memory management as a trainable skill. We promote file-system operations to first-class memory actions alongside task actions, letting the model itself decide how to manage its memory. This memory skill improves along two axes: the structure that supports it (prompts, file schemas, action
summary: 通过将记忆管理视为可训练技能，AutoMem框架显著提升了大型语言模型在长期任务中的表现。
key_insights: AutoMem成功自动化了记忆结构和模型内存熟练度的两个方面。
优化记忆管理本身可以提高基础模型在长期任务上的性能，提升幅度可达2到4倍。
研究结果表明，记忆管理是一种独立可学习的能力，并且是一个能够带来显著收益的目标。
AutoMem框架对曦和等自反层系统有潜在价值。
该技术适用于多Agent环境、工具使用以及其他需要长期决策的任务。
xihe_relevance: 有助于提升自反层系统的性能，特别是在记忆管理和长期任务方面。
